**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what the bug is.

**Which app?**
- [ ] CLI (Python TUI)
- [ ] Web app

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / Logs**
If applicable, paste error messages or screenshots.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15]
- Browser (web app): [e.g. Chrome 130]
- Python version (CLI): [e.g. 3.13]
- Node.js version (web): [e.g. 22]
